summary: The user asked to move the steering log into the open space below the model panel.
The user asked to make event-heavy sections scrollable so steering influence on training is readable.
The assistant moved the steering log into the model area and hid the older side steering card.
The assistant made the steering, audit, and trace panels render as scrollable event logs.

Make event-heavy panels scrollable so steering influence is readable.
